modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Selecting and deleting text in Word is confusing.

full_description_text:
- User was trying to select some text in Word.  
- They also wanted to delete it but didn't know how.  
- There was some confusion about the steps to do this.  
- The help desk analyst was assisting in a live chat.
short_description: Selecting and deleting text in Word is confusing.
description:
